content.text:
Now I can clearly see the molecule structure with atom labels. Let me identify the neighbors of atom N:12 (nitrogen, index 12).

From the image, I can see that atom N:12 is connected to:
- C:11 (carbon) - directly bonded to the left
- C:13 (carbon) - directly bonded to the right/below
- N:14 (nitrogen) - directly bonded to the right/above

Let me verify these connections by examining the bonds more carefully. The nitrogen atom at index 12 appears to have three covalent bonds: one to carbon 11, one to carbon 13, and one to nitrogen 14.

Looking at the geomconf_index, I can see from the file name that this is geomconf_8573.xyz, so the geomconf_index is 8573.

The neighbor atoms of atom 12 (N) are:
- Atom index 11, element C (carbon)
- Atom index 13, element C (carbon)  
- Atom index 14, element N (nitrogen)

Geomconf_index: 8573

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 12, whose element should be N. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
